review_text: One of the main negative aspect on this phenomenon is that the youth will apparently lose their own identity. They can become too dependent on celebrities’ behaviours and clothes instead of having a comprehensive reflection on themselves. Nowadays, social media platforms are becoming more and more sophisticated in making people think that only when they behave and wear luxious set of clothes, their position in the society can be levelled up higher and higher. To further extend my perspective, adolescents might be afftected serious if they follow the well-known celebrity’s bad lifestyle. Bad behaviours and improper wearing can have a negative impact on shaping our society. According to the statistics officially published by the Pew Research Centre, in 2023, the percentage of young people living in New York city who are willing to afford luxurious clothes by using credit card is nearly 65% - a record number which has never been seen before.
